name: toxicity-v3-dag
notes: Hand-curated from Borkan et al. 2019, Sap et al. 2019, and Dixon et al. 2018. The Sap finding — AAE-dialect text is more often labeled toxic — is encoded as `linguistic_dialect → annotator_pool → raw_label` (annotators systematically misjudge AAE). The Dixon finding — identity terms inflate toxicity scores — is `identity_terms_present → model_decision`. Used by services/causal-attrib (Phase 6) for DoWhy GCM attribution and DBShap fallback (text-level, no full DAG required). cause_kinds field added in Phase 6.
